violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of brown/black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine is being emptied to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Ambient temperature of the 2-door lowboy unit was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Foods observed with temperature 43 - 45 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS foods were moved to properly functioning units. No TCS foods are to be stored in this unit until it is maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

Ambient temperature of the 2-door lowboy was observed held at 52 degrees Fahrenheit. Foods in this unit observed at 46 - 48 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food products had been placed in this unit less than 2 hours prior to inspection and were moved to properly functioning units. No TCS foods are to be stored in this unit until it is serviced and maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

Prep unit is not in good repair and is not currently being used. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Parts needed for service have already been ordered. Unit is not to be used for TCS foods until it is repaired and maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

The floor near the warewashing area and under the iced coffee dispenser is in poor repair. Sections of the floor are missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floor is to be properly repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
